title: aster uliginosus
intro: Aster uliginosus, also known as the bog aster, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Aster uliginosus lie in its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and sore throat, as well as to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Aster uliginosus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be made into a salve or ointment for topical application.
